transcriptText: Hello everyone, I am Shivansh Gavarikar and today I am going to talk about why I am recording this video. The main reason I am recording this video is because I want to improve my communication skills. Everybody speaks about how important communication skills are. So I am going to improve it and find out if they are telling the truth or not. If my life has improved or not. I am just a normal kid from India and I want to improve my life. my life that is why I am trying to improve my communication skills. What I am just going to ramble about few things which are not of any significance as I just want to improve my speaking ability. For example the things I did today, today as it was just a holiday for me I didn't do much I just played around with blender and learned how to do different things learned how to do different things like I made a render of a perfume bottle it was not similar to the tutorial one which I copied but it was my first time rendering an image in blender and I have started doing another render from that same video which is about a bird The main reason I want to learn blender is that I want to learn, I want to do animation in 3D. That is the main reason I want to do it. As you, as I just sit around in my room, I have nothing to do. So most of the time I am just bored. So why not learn something useful? I always jump from one thing to another. For example, the previous year I first started. I begged my parents to buy me a laptop. And then when they bought me one, I used it. First I used it for learning coding. Then I just learned coding for 6 months. Even in learning coding I just jumped from one language to another. First I started with HTML. Then I learned CSS. Then I started doing JavaScript. After that I just jump shifted. I didn't even complete JavaScript. a JavaScript and then jumped to Python After doing Python I was intrigued by it and started doing ML And spent around one month learning different concepts of ML like logistic regression KNN and after that I followed few tutorials and made some models using the data which the tutorial provided I am just very good at copying tutorials. I have learned it is what I observed from the previous year of my life. And after that I jump shifted from learning Python. When I jump shifted to learning C, I thought that I might be interested in doing the low level stuff. So I started learning C. This is the time around December. Then I started. Then again I jump shifted from C to Rust. I learnt some word Rust. And then I again got bored of it and left it on TED. I just keep on posting the things which I want to do Then after that I I like arranged money to buy the Adobe Creative Cloud so Creative Cloud subscription and then I bought it and started learning a Premiere Pro after that I started for a few weeks I learned Premiere Pro then I jump shifted to After Effects I thought that I would make a motion design studio But after doing it for around like half month, 15 days, I also got bored of it and left it. And now I am started learning Blender again. I picked up Blender few in the previous year but left it. Now I am started doing Blender again. Between me jumping to Pringler Pro and leaving Rust, there was a time where I used to click Studio. and Krita both of them for animation I and learn how to draw I was already good at drawing but for for like seven to eight years I didn't even draw so my skills were rusty so I wanted to like wanted to like again grasp the wanted to tap into my untapped potential thank you
summary: Cut greetings, false starts, and rambling to create a fast-paced video focused on the speaker's goals and experiences with learning new skills.
